query:
WITH target_po AS (
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504644297' AS po_number UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504804493' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505568173' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504566881' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504806894' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504564630' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504644224' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504711473' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505346688' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505515012' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505677150'
)
SELECT 
  t.po_number,
  COALESCE(p.product_count, 0) AS product_count,
  COALESCE(d.delete_log_count, 0) AS delete_log_count,
  d.last_deleted_at
FROM target_po t
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT purchase_order_number, COUNT(*) AS product_count
  FROM products
  GROUP BY purchase_order_number
) p ON p.purchase_order_number = t.po_number
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT purchaseOrderNumber, COUNT(*) AS delete_log_count, MAX(createdAt) AS last_deleted_at
  FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs
  GROUP BY purchaseOrderNumber
) d ON d.purchaseOrderNumber = t.po_number
ORDER BY t.po_number;
